---
title: '2014/01/30 Journal Thu'
date: '2014-01-30T12:39:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '6956773333479982533'
blogger_filename: '/2014/01/20140130-journal-thu.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Journal'
---

1/30/2014 Journal Thu<br />
<br />
Feeling tired. It's 05:35 AM. I officially hate overtime.<br />
<br />
Thankful that overtime is available again it's better than a second job.<br />
<br />
What's up?<br />
My mom had ankle surgery yesterday in a state that is not her own. She was there to take care of Ryan after HIS surgery!<br />
<div>
<br /></div>
